name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_monthly_subcontractor_data
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_monthly_subcontractor_data' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date of special waste removal from site` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`formDate_2` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date of special waste disposal at licensed facility` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date of special waste removal from site` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`formDate_2` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date of special waste disposal at licensed facility` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Submission Date|Date of special waste removal from site|formDate_2|Date of special waste disposal at licensed facility' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_monthly_subcontractor_data`

error.message:
[UC_DEPENDENCY_DOES_NOT_EXIST] Dependency does not exist in Unity Catalog:
 Table 'transport_dev.transport_srapc.uvw_monthly_subcontractor_data' is invalid because one of the underlying resources does not exist. SQLSTATE: 42P01
